## Summary

<!-- One paragraph describing what this PR changes and why. -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Database migration (schema change — requires DBA review)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] CI/CD change

## Related Issues / Tickets

<!-- Link to Linear/GitHub issue: Closes #123 or SUNR-456 -->

## Testing Done

- [ ] Unit tests added / updated
- [ ] Tested manually in development environment
- [ ] Tested in staging environment (required for `main` merges)
- [ ] No tests required (documentation / config only)

## Database Changes

- [ ] No database changes
- [ ] New migration file added (`supabase/migrations/YYYYMMDDXXXXXX_description.sql`)
- [ ] RLS policies updated
- [ ] Seed data updated

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows Clean Architecture conventions
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or credentials in the diff
- [ ] All new UI strings use localisation keys (`context.tr()` / `t('key')`)
- [ ] TypeScript types are accurate (no `any` without justification)
- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits: `feat(admin): add complaint filter`
- [ ] CODEOWNERS notified automatically (no action required)
